backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Arena backend implementing content management, user profiles, comments, follows, messaging, and playback queues with access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: State migration module that passes the `followees` map through unchanged from the old actor state to the new actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the clickable follower count modal feature to its implementing files (FollowersModal, UserProfileView, useQueries) and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing 1–2 sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'The Arena' that mounts the app at `#root` and loads `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Feed, Upload, ContentDetail, UserProfile, Mind, and Messages pages, and conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal for new users.
Comments section component that lists comments with author profile resolution, relative timestamps, and owner-only delete functionality via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationDial: Reusable AlertDialog wrapper component for confirming destructive or non-destructive actions, with loading state and configurable labels and styling.
frontend/src/components/ContentCard.tsx: A card component displaying media content metadata (thumbnail, title, uploader, stats) with actions for liking, adding to queue, navigating to content/profile pages, and deleting (owner only) with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ConversationView: A direct-message conversation UI component that renders a scrollable message thread between two users, with avatar bubbles, send input, and auto-scroll to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileDialo: A modal dialog for editing the authenticated user's profile name, bio, and profile picture, with image preview, removal support, and size validation before submitting mutations.
A drag-and-drop / click-to-browse file input component that accepts any file type, displays file type icons, file size, and allows clearing the selection.
frontend/src/components/FollowersModal.t: A modal dialog that lists a user's followers with avatars and display names, allowing navigation to each follower's profile page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component that renders the sticky header with navigation links, logo, login/profile controls, and a queue panel toggle. Computes unread message badge count and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and toggling between login/logout states.
frontend/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx: Audio/video media player component with play/pause, seek, volume, mute, repeat, and skip controls, plus a formatted time display and track navigation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileMenu.tsx: Dropdown menu for authenticated users showing their avatar and display name, with options to edit profile, delete account, and logout.
frontend/src/components/QueuePanel.tsx: Slide-in side panel displaying the playback queue with options to reorder, remove, clear items, and navigate to a content detail page to play a selected item.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailCreator: Component for generating or uploading a thumbnail for media uploads, supporting video frame capture via a seek slider or direct image file upload.
Renders a user profile card with avatar, bio, follower/following counts, and follow/unfollow/message actions. Supports viewing own or other users' profiles and opens a followers modal.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and identity state, wrapping the DFINITY AuthClient in a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, profile pictures, content, comments, likes, follow/unfollow, messaging, and playback queue.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Tailwind imports, Arena dark-theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH colors), and utility classes for neon glow effects and card hover animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContentDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single media content item with a player, like/queue actions, uploader profile, delete option for owners, and a collapsible comments section.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Displays the main content feed with filtering by type (all/music/video), sorting (recent/popular), and search. Renders a hero banner, filter tabs, and a grid of ContentCards with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Renders the messaging page with a conversation list sidebar and an inline ConversationView. Supports searching conversations, displaying unread counts, partner avatars, and relative timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal dialog for new users to set up their profile by entering a display name, optional bio, and optional profile picture. Submits data via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Form page for uploading audio or video content, including title, description, media file, thumbnail, and album cover. Handles upload progress tracking and navigates to the feed on success.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: Route page that parses a principal from the URL and renders the UserProfileView component. Shows an error state if the principal string is invalid.
frontend/src/pages/WhatsOnYourMindPage.t: Social feed page for creating, liking, and deleting text/image posts with nested comments. Includes author avatars, relative timestamps, character limits, and confirmation dialogs for deletions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/videoFrameCapture.ts: Exports a single async function that captures the current frame of an HTMLVideoElement and returns it as a PNG Blob using a canvas.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an oklch-based color palette (including arena-specific tokens), shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations for the project.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for 'The Arena' social platform, listing existing features and pending feature requests related to publicly visible follower counts and lists.
